extortion.description: [AI generated] Logitech.com is the official website of Logitech International S.A., a Swiss-American multinational company specializing in computer peripherals and software. Logitech products include keyboards, mice, tablet accessories, webcams, home and PC speakers, headphones, and audio devices. Their items are notable for being innovative, quality made, user-friendly and diverse to cater to a range of customer needs.
